title: malva bakeri
intro: Malva bakeri, also known as the dwarf mallow, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Malvaceae, characterized by its small, pale pink or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Malva bakeri include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive discomfort, and promoting wound healing. Malva bakeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its moisturizing and antioxidant properties.
